title: Programmer, Designer, Human
body: Sami Kallinen is a programmer, designer, and concept designer based in Helsinki, Finland. He is currently working as a consultant and maintains a keen interest in the intersection of technology, art, and human experience. He can be reached at sami@8-bit-sheep.com or +358 50 320 8699.

title: Wire's Best of 2019 vs. Spotify Popularity
body: A data visualization exploring the relationship between critical acclaim and mainstream popularity. This plot organizes the artists featured in The Wire magazine's 'Best of 2019' list according to their Spotify popularity score. It reveals the divergence between avant-garde curation and algorithmic mass appeal.

title: Recruitment Campaign for KSF Media
body: A recruitment commercial for KSF Media, visualizing the dynamic nature of modern media work. Concept and production by Sami Kallinen and Karri Niinivaara.

title: Crypto-currency
body: A visual exploration of the abstract nature of cryptocurrency. Photography by Sami Kallinen.

title: Silicon Valley: Keeper of Humanity's Data?
body: A commentary on the centralization of power and data within Silicon Valley tech giants.

title: Open APIs at Yle
body: A blog post discussing the strategic implementation of Open APIs at Yle (The Finnish Broadcasting Company), enabling third-party innovation and transparency.

title: The Central Node
body: At one point, five generations of our family walked this earth simultaneously. Today, we laid our grandmother to rest. She was the quiet force—the central node—that held our sprawling family network together, running on pure kindness. Now, only the 'monsters' and I remain of my mother's direct line. We miss her deeply. Photo taken May 30, 2009.

title: Flow
body: 'Flow' is a poetic and disturbing video installation where subjects float through undefined space, experiencing simplified but intense emotional eruptions. It explores the physical manifestation of mental states. 'Like in Kallinen's other works, extreme sentiments are shown in a candid, moving way.'

title: The Juggler
body: 'The Juggler' (2003) documents the inner life of an urban hermit who practices juggling daily in front of the Dutch National Bank. Still from the exhibition at Kluuvin Galleria.
